name: Black Tee Golf
address: 131 N 300 W Suite B, St. George, UT 84770
about: Black Tee Golf is a 100% private indoor golf club located in Southern Utah. The facility utilizes TrackMan 4 Dual Radar Technology simulator bays, providing members and their guests with climate-controlled access to world-renowned golf courses like St Andrews and Pebble Beach year-round. Membership is required for access, with plans ranging from individual to corporate options, and operates 24 hours a day with online booking for 1-2 hour session blocks.
why_golfers_like_it: Unlimited access to climate-controlled facilities for year-round play
Detailed swing analysis using TrackMan 4 technology with over 40 parameters
Variety of on-course games and competitions like closest-to-the-pin and bullseye target shooting
Flexible 24/7 booking system for 1 or 2 hour sessions
Option to bring your own golf balls for accurate practice data

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site
No mention of alcohol service available on-site

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs as the facility expects members to use their own equipment for accurate TrackMan swing analysis.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention food or drink service, suggesting it may be allowed, but this is not explicitly confirmed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The facility mentions you can play 18 holes with a partner in 1 hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the website mentions bringing a family member or friend for a demo, and the limited membership option is explicitly for an individual and one guest, indicating family access is permitted.
